easy.title: Even or Odd String
easy.description: Write `even_or_odd(n)` returning `'Even'` if `n` is even else `'Odd'` using a single-line ternary.
easy.solution:
def even_or_odd(n):
    return 'Even' if n % 2 == 0 else 'Odd'

medium.title: Absolute Value Calculator
medium.description: Implement `my_abs(n)` returning `n` if `n >= 0` else `-n` using a ternary.
medium.solution:
def my_abs(n):
    return n if n >= 0 else -n

hard.title: Formatted Access Label
hard.description: Write `get_access_label(user)` returning `'Admin (Full)'` if admin, `'VIP ({tier})'` if subscriber, else `'Guest'` using clean ternary expressions.
hints: Combine early return with ternary for tier

debugging.title: Fix C-Style Ternary
debugging.description: Fix Python SyntaxError caused by C-style ternary.
bugs: Python does not use `? :` syntax. Use `X if cond else Y`.
